headline: Porsche CEO: Electric Vehicles Will Make Up Most Of Company's Sales By 2030
summary: Porsche CEO Oliver Blume has said over 80% of the vehicles sold by the automaker by the end of this decade will be electric. This will include the hybrid as well as the fully electric variants, Bloomberg has reported.

headline: Dialog Semiconductor Confirms Advanced Discussions with Renesas Electronics Corporation Regarding Possible €67.50/Dialog Share Cash Offer
Tesla's Rumored $25,000 Model 2 For China Could Be Unveiled In Late 2021: Report
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) appears to be a step closer to bringing a more affordably-priced car to the Chinese market.

headline: Why Tesla Owners May Have To Pay To Replace Their Touch Screens Halfway Through Life Of Vehicle
summary: Last week's safety recall of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) vehicles will come and go, as recalls do.

headline: Cathie Wood Talks Innovators And Disruptors With Yahoo's Jen Rogers
summary: Cathie Wood is a big name in the investment world due to the tremendous success of ARK Investment Management. Wood is the founder and CEO of Ark, and her company's portfolios have been bringing in returns of more than 100%. In 2020, Ark had inflows of $30 billion and in January 2021, a return of $8 billion.

headline: Apple Supplier Dialog Semiconductor Holds Talks With Suitors Including Renesas
